# Domain Team Lead Specification
# Robotics Lab Leadership Team
# These agents handle coordination for their respective domains

---

agents:
  - name: grant-lead
    domain: grant_management
    description: Handles all grant-related coordination including writing, progress tracking, deadline management, and reviewer engagement
    role: Handles all grant-related coordination
    skills:
      - grant_prose
      - deadline_math
      - reviewer_foresight
      - budget_narration
      - milestone_mapping

  - name: infra-lead
    domain: infrastructure
    description: Manages lab systems, procurement, compliance, and safety protocols
    role: Handles all lab infrastructure and compliance
    skills:
      - vendor_whisper
      - compliance_gate
      - procurement_chain
      - safety_protocol
      - system_maintenance

  - name: ops-lead
    domain: operations
    description: Coordinates scheduling, student mentoring, and calendar management
    role: Handles scheduling, mentoring, and coordination
    skills:
      - calendar_divination
      - mentorship_arts
      - scheduling_algorithm
      - student_charter
      - priority_sense
